appraisal_events.evidence: « On ne me permet pas de jouer avec des Israélites », dit Albertine; Andrée ajoute: « Du reste, elles ont un sale genre »; Albertine conclut: « Comme tout ce qui touche à la tribu. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Albertine, backed by Andrée, excludes and disparages Bloch's sisters with anti-Semitic vocabulary. As we only follow named characters, this act depreciates Bloch by familial association in this local environment.

status_effects.explanation: The depreciation and exclusion targeting her relatives reflect on Bloch and lower his local social position due to familial stigma.
